mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (login_id, password, name, nickname, email, phone, gender, age, height, weight, goal_type, default_mode, push_enabled) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{goalType}, #{defaultMode}, #{pushEnabled})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, password, name, nickname, email, phone, gender, age, height, weight, goal_type AS goalType, default_mode AS defaultMode, pregnant_status AS pregnantStatus, pregnancy_week AS pregnancyWeek, push_enabled AS pushEnabled, created_at AS createdAt FROM user WHERE login_id = #{loginId}

SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, password, name, nickname, email, phone, gender, age, height, weight, goal_type AS goalType, default_mode AS defaultMode, pregnant_status AS pregnantStatus, pregnancy_week AS pregnancyWeek, push_enabled AS pushEnabled, created_at AS createdAt FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET name = #{name}, nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, goal_type = #{goalType}, default_mode = #{defaultMode}, pregnant_status = #{pregnantStatus}, pregnancy_week = #{pregnancyWeek}, push_enabled = #{pushEnabled} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
